message:
Fix tour tooltip positioning and welcome dialog behavior

- Hide welcome prompt when tour is already active (check isActive state)
- Change Add Card and Templates tour steps to placement: 'top' to prevent
  tooltips from being cut off at bottom of viewport
- Change AI Recommendations step to placement: 'right' to align with sidebar
- Add data-tour attribute to open MissionSidebar so AI Missions step can
  highlight the sidebar when it's open
- Open mission sidebar automatically when on the AI Missions tour step

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
